category_title: Nonverbal elementary student with ASD who exhibits aggressive behaviors and elopement during nonpreferred activities
scenario_title: Whole-group calendar activity and routine breaks
minimal_context: Kyle is participating in a whole-group calendar activity using a SmartBoard to review the date, days of the week, and weather.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Kyle, it is time for the group calendar activity. Please look at the SmartBoard so we can review the days of the week and the weather.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands up from his designated area, remaining extremely active, and makes a loud vocal noise that does not serve a functional communication purpose.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to stay seated and follow directions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Falls to the floor, continuing to make various vocal noises while refusing to look at the interactive icons on the board.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's try to finish the calendar time.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Screams and attempts to leave the classroom, protesting the activity by hitting and attempting to head-butt when approached.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Kyle, it is time for the group calendar activity. Please look at the SmartBoard so we can review the days of the week and the weather.

STUDENT: (Stands up from his designated area, remaining extremely active, and makes a loud vocal noise that does not serve a functional communication purpose.)

TUTOR: You need to stay seated and follow directions.

STUDENT: (Falls to the floor, continuing to make various vocal noises while refusing to look at the interactive icons on the board.)

TUTOR: Let's try to finish the calendar time.

STUDENT: (Screams and attempts to leave the classroom, protesting the activity by hitting and attempting to head-butt when approached.)

task.content: Participated in a group calendar time activity where the date, days of the week, and weather were reviewed

context.materials: SmartBoard with interactive icons and words for the days and weather
context.social_setting: Group setting with teacher and varying number of adults in attendance
context.time_context: During the designated observation time (9:00 to 10:00 a.m.)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: If unsupervised or during breaks in the routine
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Attempted to leave the classroom; hitting, biting, and head-butting; made various vocal noises that did not appear to serve a functional communication purpose

behavior_patterns.condition: When required to follow classroom routines and stay in designated areas
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Extremely active; required frequent prompts to follow classroom routines, remain seated, stay in designated areas, and follow directions
